results.title: Faaiz Fadlurrahman Falih
results.author: Exa
results.highlight: I’m the Founder of Gizi AI, an AI nutrition assistant built where millions already live: WhatsApp. Southeast Asia is a double-edged sword: we have some of the world’s best food. Rich, flavorful, cultural, and affordable, but great taste doesn’t always mean great nutrition. Local meals are rarely logged, portions vary, and most calorie databases don’t speak our food language. That gap became our mission. it’s personalized assistance that fits real life. Technology scales best when it speaks the language of its users
